name: Jiangxi Fushine Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangxi Fushine Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of APIs and pharmaceutical intermediates in China and internationally. The company offers penicillin, carbapenem, and other products. It also provides contract research, development, and manufacturing services. The company was formerly known as Jingdezhen Fuxiang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd and changed its name to Jiangxi Fushine Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. in August 2012. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Jingdezhen, China.
